examples: Get up, and begone out of my sight, "said the mourner."
By courtesy of the mourner, he endeavours to devour the nourishing odour.
Another said: "Goodnight, God bless" with one mourner addressing their card: "To 'my brother' Marlon".
Mr Matrook's family says he was hit while bending down to assist a mourner who had been overcome by tear gas.
